entities.name: Productivity tools
entities.context: Software/systems that assume standard cognitive capacities in users

entities.name: Neurodivergent users
entities.context: Users whose cognitive patterns differ from standard assumptions, requiring different tool design

entities.name: Standard user assumption
entities.context: The flawed premise that users have uniform cognitive capacities for discipline and consistency

relationships.context: Most tools are built on the assumption of standard cognitive capacities
Neurodivergent users don't fit the standard user mold
Tools overestimate neurodivergent users' ability to maintain discipline and consistency
